description: Hotel Smyle Inn occupies a comfortable mid-point in Paharganj's hotel ecosystem — well above the budget backpacker guesthouses but offering the kind of honest, unfussy hospitality that experienced independent travellers value. The rooms are clean, air-conditioned, and properly maintained. The staff speak functional English and are accustomed to serving international guests. The hotel's proximity to New Delhi Railway Station makes it a natural choice for travellers working around train schedules, and the Paharganj metro station connects the hotel directly to every major Delhi interchange. A reliable rooftop café is available. For solo travellers, budget-conscious couples, or anyone seeking a safe and decent base in the transit heart of Delhi, Smyle Inn has long been a trusted name on the backpacker trail.
knownFor: Paharganj's most trusted three-star for international travellers, clean reliable rooms, New Delhi Station proximity, rooftop café, and a reputation built over two decades of positive traveller reviews
address: Tooti Chowk, Arakashan Road, Paharganj, New Delhi, Delhi 110055

name: Lemon Tree Hotel, Lajpat Nagar
tagline: South Delhi's mid-range smart stay — Lemon Tree reliability and pool in the heart of Lajpat Nagar.
description: Lemon Tree Hotel Lajpat Nagar delivers the Lemon Tree brand's consistent, cheerful mid-market formula — clean rooms with good natural light, a reliable restaurant, and attentive service — in one of South Delhi's most vibrant residential and commercial neighbourhoods. Lajpat Nagar is the cultural crossroads of Delhi's partition-era Punjabi community: its Central Market is the city's go-to for ethnic wear, accessories, and home furnishings at wholesale-adjacent prices. The Pink Line metro station at Lajpat Nagar connects the hotel to Hazrat Nizamuddin station, Mayur Vihar, and Greater Kailash easily. The pool is a genuine bonus at this price point. For guests visiting South Delhi families or shopping the Central Market, Lemon Tree Lajpat is the most sensible booking.
knownFor: Lajpat Nagar Central Market access, Lemon Tree brand reliability, outdoor pool at this price point, Pink Line metro connectivity, and the best mid-range stay for South Delhi shopping and family visits
address: 11, Ring Road, Lajpat Nagar II, New Delhi, Delhi 110024

name: Keys Select Hotel, Nehru Place
tagline: South-East Delhi's most functional three-star — in the IT hub of Nehru Place, with Violet Line metro on the doorstep.
description: Keys Select Hotel Nehru Place serves a clear and underserved market: the technology and corporate professional community centred on Nehru Place, Delhi's largest IT and electronics market and a significant commercial district. The hotel delivers clean, well-maintained rooms, a functional restaurant, and efficient service in a building that is a short walk from Nehru Place metro station on the Violet Line. For IT professionals, electronics traders, and anyone visiting the cluster of companies and government offices in the South-East Delhi corridor, this hotel removes the hassle of commuting from more central hotels. The Okhla Industrial Area and Jasola commercial zones are within reasonable reach.
knownFor: Nehru Place IT hub proximity, Violet Line metro walkability, corporate-oriented three-star reliability, South-East Delhi's best mid-range base, and practical access to Okhla and Jasola commercial zones
address: Block B, Nehru Place, New Delhi, Delhi 110019

name: Madpackers Hauz Khas
tagline: Delhi's best social hostel-hotel hybrid — design, community, and rooftop views in the heart of Hauz Khas Village.
description: Madpackers Hauz Khas is the accommodation that the Hauz Khas Village scene deserves — a design-forward social hotel-hostel hybrid that places guests inside one of Delhi's most vibrant cultural enclaves. Hauz Khas Village is the intersection of Delhi's art, design, nightlife, and independent dining worlds: narrow lanes packed with galleries, vintage shops, concept cafés, and bars, all built against the medieval Hauz Khas complex and its deer park. Madpackers occupies a characterful building with a rooftop that overlooks this landscape, offering private rooms alongside shared dormitory options. The common spaces are genuinely designed for socialising. The Yellow Line metro at IIT Delhi is a short auto ride away. For young and young-at-heart guests who want to be inside Delhi's creative scene rather than watching it from a distance, Madpackers Hauz Khas is the correct booking.
knownFor: Hauz Khas Village cultural immersion, Delhi's best social hotel atmosphere, rooftop views over the medieval complex, mixed private and dorm options, and the most creatively located mid-range stay in South Delhi
address: 12, Hauz Khas Village, New Delhi, Delhi 110016

name: Hotel Sunstar Grand
tagline: Karol Bagh's well-established three-star — pool, reliable multi-cuisine dining, and metro access at a sensible price.
description: Hotel Sunstar Grand is one of Karol Bagh's most established and consistently reviewed three-star properties — a hotel that has been a reliable choice for domestic travellers visiting Delhi for shopping, family events, and connections to the Rajasthan circuit. The hotel has an outdoor pool — unusual and valued at this price point — a well-regarded restaurant serving Indian and international cuisine, a bar, and competent business infrastructure. The Karol Bagh metro station is within easy walking distance, providing Blue Line connectivity to Connaught Place and Dwarka Sector 21. The rooms are maintained to a standard that consistently outperforms competitors at the same rate. For families, groups, and domestic business travellers who want familiar, predictable quality in a convenient Delhi location, Sunstar Grand is a dependable choice.
knownFor: Outdoor pool at three-star pricing, reliable multi-cuisine restaurant, Karol Bagh metro proximity, well-maintained rooms for domestic travellers, and one of the area's most consistently reviewed mid-range properties
address: WEA, Pusa Road, Karol Bagh, New Delhi, Delhi 110005

name: ibis Styles New Delhi Janakpuri
tagline: West Delhi's Accor smart-budget option — ibis Styles design and reliability in the Blue Line's Janakpuri corridor.
description: ibis Styles New Delhi Janakpuri brings Accor's reliable smart-budget brand to West Delhi — a large, dense residential and commercial area that has historically lacked quality hotel options. Janakpuri is well-connected: it sits on the Blue Line metro between Dwarka and Connaught Place, making it practical for airport transfers, city centre visits, and business trips along the western metro corridor. The ibis Styles formula emphasises design-led public spaces and a strong breakfast programme within a compact, budget-conscious room format. The all-inclusive breakfast is a particular strength. For guests visiting West Delhi families, attending events in the Janakpuri commercial district, or simply wanting a clean, branded, metro-accessible base without CP pricing, ibis Styles Janakpuri fills a genuine gap in the market.
knownFor: West Delhi's best branded budget hotel, Accor ibis Styles reliability, Blue Line metro connectivity, all-inclusive breakfast, and the most sensible smart-budget base for West Delhi visits
address: District Centre, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi 110058

name: FabHotel Prime Maharaja
tagline: Punjabi Bagh's reliable budget-smart choice — clean rooms, breakfast, and Green Line metro access in North-West Delhi.
description: FabHotel Prime Maharaja is the kind of hotel that Punjabi Bagh and the north-west Delhi corridor has needed — a clean, reliable, smartly managed property at a price point that domestic travellers and young professionals can sustain. The FabHotel Prime tier sits above the standard FabHotel offering, with improved room finish, air conditioning, complimentary breakfast, and consistent WiFi. The area around Punjabi Bagh, Rajouri Garden, and Tagore Garden is a densely populated, commercially active part of Delhi that generates significant demand from visiting family, medical travellers, and business visitors to the Ring Road commercial strip. The Green Line metro at Punjabi Bagh West provides direct access to Inderlok and onward city connections.
knownFor: Punjabi Bagh's best budget-smart hotel, FabHotel Prime brand reliability, complimentary breakfast, Green Line metro access, and practical proximity to Ring Road commercial and medical facilities
address: Punjabi Bagh West, New Delhi, Delhi 110026

name: Holiday Inn New Delhi Mayur Vihar Noida
tagline: The IHG four-star bridging Delhi and Noida — pool, complete business infrastructure, and Blue Line metro access.
description: Holiday Inn New Delhi Mayur Vihar Noida occupies a strategic position at the Delhi-Noida border — one of the most active commercial corridors in the NCR — and is the best hotel serving both the Mayur Vihar residential community and guests whose work takes them across the Delhi-UP border into Noida. The IHG Holiday Inn brand's formula is dependable: comfortable, spacious rooms; a proper restaurant and bar; a well-maintained outdoor pool; and solid business meeting infrastructure. The Blue Line metro at Mayur Vihar Phase-1 puts the hotel on the same line as Rajiv Chowk, and the Noida Sector 15 metro is equally accessible. For corporate travellers splitting time between Delhi and Noida, or families visiting the east Delhi-Noida belt, this Holiday Inn is a rational, brand-assured base.
knownFor: Delhi-Noida border location, IHG Holiday Inn reliability, outdoor pool, Blue Line and Noida metro access, and the most strategically placed four-star for NCR east-corridor business travel
address: Plot No. A-1, Mayur Vihar Phase 1 Extension, New Delhi, Delhi 110091

name: Courtyard by Marriott New Delhi
tagline: Saket's Marriott four-star — consistent brand quality near Select Citywalk, DLF, and the Yellow Line metro.
description: Courtyard by Marriott New Delhi is Marriott's productive mid-tier brand at work in Saket — the commercial and retail hub of South Delhi. The hotel sits close to Select Citywalk (consistently rated one of India's best malls), DLF Place, and the Saket metro station on the Yellow Line. The Courtyard formula delivers: well-proportioned rooms with Marriott Bonvoy points accumulation, a strong restaurant and bar in Bistro, a pool that is unusually well-maintained for the brand tier, and meeting rooms suited to the South Delhi corporate community. For leisure guests, Saket's proximity to Qutub Minar (2 km) and the Mehrauli archaeological zone makes this a practical base for heritage exploration.
knownFor: Saket's Marriott four-star, proximity to Select Citywalk mall, Yellow Line metro, Marriott Bonvoy value, pool, and the most dependable corporate four-star in South Delhi
address: Select City Walk Complex, Saket, New Delhi, Delhi 110017

name: Sheraton New Delhi Hotel
tagline: South Delhi's Sheraton — Marriott upper-upscale in Saket with a strong club lounge and extensive meetings programme.
description: Sheraton New Delhi Hotel brings Marriott's upper-upscale Sheraton brand to the Saket district — a notch above the Courtyard in the same area and squarely positioned as the corporate four-star of choice for South Delhi's executive community. The hotel has 308 rooms, a well-regarded all-day dining restaurant, a proper spa and gym, and a Club Lounge that is considered one of the better executive experiences in the South Delhi hotel corridor. The meeting and banquet infrastructure extends to over 10,000 square feet — making it the hotel of choice for mid-to-large corporate events in South Delhi. The Yellow Line metro access and proximity to DLF, Jasola, and Okhla make the hotel naturally connected to the South Delhi business ecosystem.
knownFor: South Delhi executive four-star, Sheraton Club Lounge quality, 10,000 sq ft meetings infrastructure, DLF and Jasola corporate access, and the strongest upper-upscale product in the Saket-South Delhi corridor
address: District Centre, Saket, New Delhi, Delhi 110017

name: The Muse Sarovar Portico, Kapashera
tagline: Between Aerocity and Dwarka — Sarovar's four-star offers pool, spa, and Indian hospitality near the airport at great value.
description: The Muse Sarovar Portico Kapashera occupies a clever position in the Delhi hotel market: close enough to IGI Airport and Aerocity to serve transit guests, but significantly cheaper than the JW Marriott and Pullman, while offering a fuller amenity set than the budget airport hotels. Sarovar Hotels is India's most established homegrown hotel chain, and the Portico tier represents their upper-mid positioning — full spa, outdoor pool, multiple restaurants, and the warm, personalised service that Indian hospitality brands typically deliver with great naturalness. The hotel serves Kapashera and the Dwarka-Airport Road corridor — an area with significant corporate and industrial activity. For domestic travellers who want comfort, a pool, and Indian food they trust, this is a strong choice near the airport.
knownFor: Best value near IGI Airport, Sarovar Indian hospitality warmth, outdoor pool and spa at non-Aerocity pricing, Kapashera-Dwarka corridor access, and the most Indian hospitality-forward hotel near the airport
address: NH-48, Kapashera, New Delhi, Delhi 110037

name: Crowne Plaza New Delhi Okhla
tagline: South-East Delhi's IHG four-star — serving Okhla's industrial and tech corridor, near the Jasola Apollo metro.
description: Crowne Plaza New Delhi Okhla serves a highly active commercial zone encompassing the Okhla Industrial Area, Jasola Vihar, and the South Delhi Knowledge Park — a belt of factories, tech parks, and institutions that generates significant hospitality demand but has limited quality hotel supply. The hotel delivers the full Crowne Plaza standard: spacious rooms, a proper spa, outdoor pool, comprehensive banqueting, and the IHG One Rewards programme. The Jasola Apollo metro station on the Violet Line connects the area efficiently to the rest of the city. For professionals in the Okhla-Jasola corridor, this Crowne Plaza is the default premium choice.
knownFor: Okhla's most complete four-star, IHG Crowne Plaza standard, Violet Line metro access, large banquet and meetings infrastructure, and the best hotel serving Delhi's South-East industrial and tech corridor
address: Jasola District Centre, Okhla, New Delhi, Delhi 110025

name: Hyatt Place New Delhi Dwarka
tagline: Dwarka's Hyatt — affordable World of Hyatt points, pool, and a practical base between the airport and West Delhi.
description: Hyatt Place New Delhi Dwarka fills the gap between the Vivanta Dwarka and the budget options in West Delhi's sprawling Sector 44 corridor. The Hyatt Place brand is Hyatt's extended-stay and select-service offering — the rooms are generously proportioned, the all-day Gallery Kitchen provides good food without formal dining room constraints, and the World of Hyatt programme delivers real value for frequent travellers. Dwarka's Blue Line metro connectivity makes the airport 20 minutes away without traffic. For families visiting the large Dwarka residential community, guests attending events at nearby venues, or transit travellers wanting Hyatt loyalty points without JW Marriott pricing, Hyatt Place Dwarka is a strong proposition.
knownFor: Dwarka's most accessible Hyatt property, World of Hyatt points value, Gallery Kitchen all-day dining, Blue Line metro access, and a comfortable base for West Delhi visitors and airport transits
address: Sector 44, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi 110078

name: Ramada by Wyndham Pitampura
tagline: North Delhi's most complete four-star — Wyndham reliability, pool, and banquet strength in Pitampura's residential hub.
description: Ramada by Wyndham Pitampura is the most complete four-star hotel in North Delhi's inner residential corridor — an area encompassing Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, and Ashok Vihar that is home to several hundred thousand residents. The Ramada brand delivers its consistent international standard: well-proportioned rooms, a pool, gym, multi-cuisine restaurant, and the meeting and banquet infrastructure that makes it the venue of choice for North Delhi's corporate events and family celebrations. The Yellow Line metro at Netaji Subhash Place connects the hotel to Kashmere Gate and the main rail hubs. For guests visiting North Delhi residents or attending events in the area, Ramada Pitampura is the natural anchor hotel.
knownFor: North Delhi's best four-star hotel outside Rohini, Wyndham brand reliability, outdoor pool and banquet halls, Yellow Line metro access, and the most complete hospitality offering in the Pitampura-Shalimar Bagh belt
address: Plot No. 1, Community Centre, Pitampura, New Delhi, Delhi 110034

name: The Roseate House New Delhi
tagline: Aerocity's boutique four-star sister to The Roseate — garden design, wellness focus, and a calmer alternative in the airport district.
description: The Roseate House is the more accessible sibling of The Roseate New Delhi — a four-star property in Aerocity that carries the Roseate brand's distinctive identity (biophilic design, wellness emphasis, natural materials) without the five-star price point. In a hospitality district otherwise dominated by large international chains, the Roseate House stands out for the quality of its landscaping, the warmth of its design vocabulary, and the evident care taken over the dining and spa experience. The Kiyan Brasserie brings the same commitment to quality found at the parent property. For guests who want something more characterful than the Ibis or Aloft without paying JW Marriott rates, and who respond to the Roseate's wellness-oriented philosophy, this is the most satisfying four-star booking in Aerocity.
knownFor: Aerocity's most characterful four-star, Roseate brand biophilic design, Kiyan Brasserie dining, wellness focus at four-star pricing, and the best alternative to corporate airport hotel blandness
address: Asset 6, Aerocity Hospitality District, New Delhi, Delhi 110037

name: Fortune Select Global, Gurgaon
tagline: ITC's Fortune brand on the NH-48 corridor — a dependable four-star serving Delhi's southern gateway near Gurgaon.
description: Fortune Select Global Gurgaon is part of ITC's Fortune hotel chain — a brand that consistently punches above its price point in terms of food quality and service warmth, reflecting ITC's hospitality DNA at a more accessible tier. Positioned on the NH-48 corridor (the Delhi-Jaipur-Mumbai highway) in Gurgaon, the hotel serves the considerable corporate traffic flowing between Delhi, the Gurgaon Cyber City corridor, and IGI Airport. The rooms are well-proportioned and maintained to ITC standards. The all-day dining restaurant carries the quality of the Fortune brand's food programme. For corporate travellers who want ITC quality at four-star pricing — and who value the ITC One rewards programme — Fortune Select Global is the natural booking in this part of the NCR.
knownFor: ITC Fortune brand food and service quality at four-star pricing, NH-48 corridor location, ITC One rewards programme, and the most reliable India-heritage brand hotel on the Gurgaon-Delhi approach
address: Mehrauli-Gurgaon Road, DLF Phase I, Gurgaon, Haryana 122002

name: Pullman New Delhi Aerocity
tagline: Aerocity's French luxury — Accor's premium Pullman brand with a rooftop bar and design-forward rooms near IGI Airport.
description: Pullman New Delhi Aerocity brings Accor's French-accented premium brand to the airport district — the only Pullman in Delhi and one of the more stylistically distinctive hotels in Aerocity. The lobby is designed to make an impression: double-height, sculptural, and visually confident in a way that similarly-tiered airport hotels rarely attempt. The rooms carry Pullman's signature: good dimensions, sophisticated colour palettes, superior bedding, and thoughtful technology integration. The rooftop bar Pluck is the most talked-about watering hole in the upper tier of Aerocity properties. The spa and pool are well-executed. Dining at Collage — the all-day restaurant — is a step above average in design experience. For guests who want a design-forward luxury experience near the airport with Accor All programme benefits, Pullman is an excellent choice.
knownFor: Aerocity's most design-forward luxury hotel, Pluck rooftop bar, Accor All programme value, Pullman brand's French premium identity, and the most visually striking hotel in the airport district
address: Asset Area 4, Hospitality District, Aerocity, New Delhi, Delhi 110037
amenities: 3 Restaurants & Bars (Collage, Pluck Rooftop Bar, Kode)

name: Andaz Delhi
tagline: Aerocity's most culturally expressive luxury hotel — Hyatt's art-forward Andaz brand, rooftop pool, and Delhi's creative spirit near the airport.
description: Andaz Delhi is Hyatt's culturally immersive luxury brand at its most impressive — and arguably the most design-sophisticated hotel in the Aerocity district. The entire property was conceived as a love letter to Delhi's creative energy: artwork by Indian contemporary artists fills every public space, the architecture references Mughal garden design through its use of water, geometry, and greenery, and the rooms carry hand-painted accents and bespoke Indian craft objects. The rooftop pool and bar — Setz — is the most dramatic hotel rooftop experience in Aerocity, with views over the airport approach. The hotel's restaurants are genuinely excellent: Setz (the all-day dining room) serves modern Indian and international cuisines to a high standard, while the wine and cocktail programme reflects serious investment. The Andaz Studio spa is beautifully designed. This is the airport hotel for guests who refuse to accept that proximity to the runway means sacrificing soul.
knownFor: Aerocity's most culturally and design-rich hotel, Setz rooftop pool and bar, Indian contemporary art programme, Andaz Hyatt luxury brand identity, and the most aesthetically distinguished luxury stay near IGI Airport
address: Asset Area 5, Aerocity, New Delhi, Delhi 110037
amenities: 3 Restaurants & Bars (Setz, Setz Rooftop Bar, Analog Bar)

name: The Park New Delhi
tagline: Connaught Place's style icon — Apeejay Surrendra's design-led five-star with Fire restaurant and Delhi's most talked-about hotel nightlife.
description: The Park New Delhi is the city's original design hotel — an Apeejay Surrendra Group property on Parliament Street that has been Connaught Place's most style-conscious address since it pioneered the concept of the Indian boutique luxury hotel in the late 1990s. Where The Imperial is about heritage and The LaLiT about grandeur, The Park is about contemporary Indian design: the interiors change with commissioned artwork, the public spaces carry a gallery-quality aesthetic, and the F&B programme was among the first in India to take hospitality nightlife seriously. Fire — the restaurant — was a pioneer of progressive Indian cuisine in Delhi and retains a strong following. Agni — the bar and club — remains one of the most atmospheric drinking and dancing spaces in central Delhi. The rooftop Aqua pool-bar is a summer institution. For guests who want five-star luxury filtered through a design and nightlife sensibility, The Park is the correct address in CP.
knownFor: CP's original design hotel, Fire progressive Indian restaurant, Agni bar and club, Aqua rooftop pool, Apeejay's art-commissioning philosophy, and the most culturally vibrant luxury hotel atmosphere in central Delhi
address: 15, Parliament Street, New Delhi, Delhi 110001
amenities: 3 Restaurants & Bars (Fire, Agni Club & Bar, Aqua)

name: Hyatt Centric Janakpuri New Delhi
tagline: West Delhi's first true luxury hotel — Hyatt's lifestyle Centric brand fills a long-standing gap in Delhi's west.
description: Hyatt Centric Janakpuri is a significant arrival for West Delhi — the first genuine international luxury hotel brand in an area of the city that has been underserved by quality hospitality despite its large and prosperous residential population. The Hyatt Centric brand is Hyatt's experiential lifestyle luxury tier — younger-feeling than the Grand Hyatt, more polished than the Hyatt Place — and it brings a rooftop, strong dining, and the World of Hyatt programme to the Janakpuri District Centre. The Blue Line metro makes the airport and Connaught Place equally accessible. For West Delhi's professional and business community — who have long had to travel to CP or Aerocity for a proper luxury hotel stay — the Hyatt Centric Janakpuri is a transformative addition to the neighbourhood's hotel options.
knownFor: West Delhi's first international luxury hotel, Hyatt Centric lifestyle brand, World of Hyatt points, Blue Line metro access to airport and CP, and a landmark arrival for the Janakpuri professional community
address: District Centre, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi 110058

name: Grand Hyatt New Delhi
tagline: Vasant Vihar's Grand Hyatt — dramatic architecture, a 5,000-piece art collection, and South Delhi luxury at the airport approach.
description: Grand Hyatt New Delhi is the most architecturally dramatic hotel in South Delhi — a property with soaring public spaces, an extraordinary art collection of over 5,000 works, and the complete Grand Hyatt luxury programme deployed in the Vasant Vihar / Nelson Mandela Marg corridor. The hotel is close to the Delhi-Gurgaon border and equally convenient for the airport, the Gurgaon Cyber City, and South Delhi's most prosperous residential enclaves. The Mosaic all-day dining venue is one of the better hotel buffet experiences in South Delhi. The spa is comprehensive. The rooftop pool has views over the Aravalli ridge. Grand Hyatt's positioning — a step above the Hyatt Regency but more accessible than The Oberoi — fills a specific space in Delhi's luxury landscape with considerable confidence.
knownFor: 5,000-piece art collection, architectural drama in South Delhi, Mosaic all-day dining, Aravalli rooftop views, Vasant Vihar location near Gurgaon and airport, and the most impressive lobby in South Delhi luxury
address: Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi, Delhi 110070
amenities: 4 Restaurants & Bars (Mosaic, The Café, The Whiskey Bar, Pool Bar)

name: ITC Grand Bharat, a Luxury Collection Retreat
tagline: An Aravalli retreat 45 minutes from Delhi — ITC's 100-acre golf and wellness estate, among the finest luxury resorts in India.
description: ITC Grand Bharat is, by almost any measure, the most extraordinary luxury resort within reach of Delhi — a 100-acre estate in the Aravalli hills near Manesar, approximately 45 minutes from the capital. The resort was conceived as a tribute to the Indian subcontinent's extraordinary geography: the architecture draws from the haveli tradition of Rajasthan, the courtyard culture of the south, and the garden heritage of the Mughals, all synthesised in a contemporary design language. There are three championship golf courses across the estate. The Kaya Kalp Royal Spa — ITC's signature wellness brand — reaches its fullest expression here. Nine restaurants and bars serve cuisine from across the subcontinent. The 104 villas and suites, many with private pools, are among the most spacious in Indian hospitality. This is the answer for Delhi-based guests seeking a weekend escape or for international visitors who want a resort experience within a single hour of the capital.
knownFor: 100-acre Aravalli estate, three championship golf courses, Kaya Kalp Royal Spa at its fullest, 9 restaurants spanning India's culinary regions, private-pool villas, and the finest resort within reach of Delhi
address: Hasanpur Village, P.O. Tauru, Mewat, Haryana 122105

name: Eros Hotel New Delhi, Nehru Place
tagline: South-East Delhi's five-star anchor — a full-service luxury property in Nehru Place serving the IT, corporate, and medical corridor.
description: Eros Hotel New Delhi Nehru Place is the five-star anchor of South-East Delhi's commercial district — a comprehensive luxury property that has served the Nehru Place IT market, the Okhla industrial belt, and the Kailash Colony-Greater Kailash residential community for decades. The hotel has 220 rooms and suites, an outdoor pool, a full spa, and a dining programme centred on the excellent Blooms restaurant. Its proximity to the Nehru Place and Kalkaji metro stations on the Violet Line makes it well-connected. The ballroom and banqueting infrastructure has hosted thousands of South Delhi weddings and corporate events. For professionals in the South Delhi IT district, for medical travellers heading to Max Saket, and for South Delhi families seeking a celebration venue, Eros Nehru Place is the established choice.
knownFor: South-East Delhi's premier five-star, Blooms restaurant, extensive banqueting for South Delhi events, Violet Line metro access, and the most established luxury hotel in the Nehru Place-Greater Kailash corridor
address: Nehru Place, New Delhi, Delhi 110019

name: Radisson Blu Hotel New Delhi Dwarka
tagline: West Delhi's Radisson Blu — luxury five-star serving Dwarka, Janakpuri, and the airport corridor with a rooftop pool.
description: Radisson Blu Hotel New Delhi Dwarka is the most complete luxury hotel in the western arc of Delhi — a full five-star property that serves the very large Dwarka residential population, the Janakpuri commercial district, and the airport transit market with equal capability. The hotel's rooftop pool is one of the most scenic in West Delhi, looking out over the Dwarka township and the airport approach roads. The Latitude restaurant delivers a quality all-day dining programme. The banquet halls are popular for Dwarka community events and large corporate functions. Both the Blue Line metro and the NH-48 airport expressway run close to the property. For West Delhi guests who want Radisson Blu brand quality, a loyalty programme, and access to South Delhi and the airport without Aerocity pricing, this is the premier choice in the western sector.
knownFor: West Delhi's best luxury hotel, Radisson Blu quality and rewards, rooftop pool with Dwarka skyline views, Blue Line metro and airport expressway access, and the most complete five-star product west of Aerocity
address: Plot 4, Sector 13, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi 110075
